news.t: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Expands BetaBuilders ETF Suite with Launch of BBLB, BBIB and BBSB

overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders U.S. Treasury Bond 1-3 Year ETF (BBSB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Treasury Bond (1-3 Y) index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US Treasurys with one to three years until maturity. Constituents are selected using the same manner that they are weighted. BBSB was launched on Apr 19, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: ICE BofA US Treasury Bond (1-3 Y)

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Expands BetaBuilders ETF Suite with Launch of BBLB, BBIB and BBSB
